key_metric.description: Number of coding principle violations (lower is better)
key_metric.validation: Review the code at the target path for violations of established coding principles (KISS, YAGNI, DRY, SOLID, Small Functions, Guard Clauses, Cognitive Load, Self-Documenting Code, Encapsulation, Fail-Fast, etc). Count only REAL, actionable violations — not style nitpicks. A violation must be fixable and must clearly hurt readability, maintainability, or correctness. Score = number of violations found.
